initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT fd.name
FROM cards c
JOIN sets s ON c.uuid = s.uuid
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE s.code = 'Coldsnap'
  AND fd.language = 'it_IT'
  AND c.convertedManaCost = (
    SELECT MAX(c2.convertedManaCost)
    FROM cards c2
    JOIN sets s2 ON c2.uuid = s2.uuid
    WHERE s2.code = 'Coldsnap'
  );

SELECT fd.name
FROM cards c
JOIN sets s ON c.uuid = s.uuid
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE s.code = 'Coldsnap'
  AND fd.language = 'it_IT'
  AND c.convertedManaCost = (
    SELECT MAX(c2.convertedManaCost)
    FROM cards c2
    JOIN sets s2 ON c2.uuid = s2.uuid
    JOIN foreign_data fd2 ON c2.uuid = fd2.uuid
    WHERE s2.code = 'Coldsnap'
      AND fd2.language = 'it_IT'
  );
